title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Godrej Properties

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Godrej Properties
jsonLd.description:
We at Godrej Properties are looking for an experienced Business Development Manager based out of Nashik. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Godrej Properties:
Godrej Properties is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Properties!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
